description: Express route handler for planning milestones in a career navigation app, including focus inference based on persona data and milestone generation logic.

methods.name: _safeString
methods.description: Sanitizes input value to a string, providing a fallback if null or undefined.

methods.name: _inferFocusFromPersona
methods.description: Infers focus area ('data', 'frontend', 'backend', 'cloud', or 'general') based on persona competencies and tech stack.

methods.name: _makeMilestones
methods.description: Generates a list of strategic milestones based on goal, timeframe, and focus.
